title: Get started with tax reporting
excerpt: Use the Stripe 1099 tax reporting product to create, modify, file, and deliver tax forms for your connected accounts. Stripe provides [capabilities](https://docs.stripe.com/connect/account-capabilities.md?accounts-namespace=v1#tax-reporting) and a tax reporting dashboard to help platforms meet their [tax reporting obligations](https://support.stripe.com/questions/1099-tax-reporting-and-filing-for-platforms-and-marketplaces). Log in to your Stripe account and use the [Tax reporting](https://dashboard.stripe.com/connect/taxes/forms) view in the Dashboard to create, modify, file, and deliver 1099 tax forms for your connected accounts.…
